purpose: Raw source manifest for the preregistered LLM-based human-data simulation protocol study.

sources.name: AIID: Attitudes, Identities, and Individual Differences
sources.domain_family: individual differences, identity, social attitudes, psychometrics
sources.prediction_context: person-level explicit and implicit attitudes, identities, demographics, and individual-difference measures
sources.manual_next_steps: Optional: download trial-level AIID files only if item/trial-level analyses require them.

sources.name: Project Implicit Demo Website Datasets: Race IAT 2025
sources.domain_family: implicit cognition, explicit attitudes, intergroup bias, reaction-time tasks
sources.prediction_context: IAT scores, explicit attitudes, demographics, and task metadata
sources.manual_next_steps: If broader Project Implicit coverage is needed, add further IAT domains or years as separate raw subdirectories.

sources.name: ANES Time Series Cumulative Data File
sources.domain_family: political behavior, elections, ideology, public opinion
sources.prediction_context: vote choice, policy opinions, ideology, party identification, demographics, and political attitudes
sources.manual_next_steps: Download the cumulative raw data file from ANES and place it in data/raw/anes_cdf/.

sources.name: General Social Survey
sources.domain_family: US social attitudes, demographic structure, behavior, social norms
sources.prediction_context: survey responses across attitudes, institutions, social behavior, religion, morality, politics, and demographics
sources.manual_next_steps: Retrieve the required cumulative extract from GSS Data Explorer or the official GSS download interface.

sources.name: European Social Survey Data Round 1-11 merged
sources.domain_family: cross-national European attitudes, values, politics, well-being, trust
sources.prediction_context: survey responses across European countries and rounds with country, round, and respondent-level predictors
sources.manual_next_steps: Direct curl download returned HTTP 403. Download the 10.6 MB .dta file via the Zenodo browser page and place it in data/raw/ess/.

sources.name: World Values Survey
sources.domain_family: global values, culture, religion, political attitudes, trust, norms
sources.prediction_context: cross-national value and belief responses across countries and waves
sources.manual_next_steps: Download Wave 7 or the time-series file after accepting WVSA terms and place raw files in data/raw/wvs/.

sources.name: Moral Machine
sources.domain_family: moral judgment, autonomous-vehicle dilemmas, cross-cultural ethics
sources.prediction_context: forced-choice moral dilemmas with scenario attributes and country-level context
sources.manual_next_steps: Download full individual-level response archives from the OSF project only if needed for full confirmatory analysis.

sources.name: Psych-101 / Centaur
sources.domain_family: cognitive science, trial-by-trial decision-making, psychological experiments
sources.prediction_context: trial-level choices across many experiments expressible in natural language
sources.manual_next_steps: Use Hugging Face tooling to download large prompt/response files intentionally.

sources.name: Pilot MMLU target-to-model mapping
sources.prediction_context: latent model-capability anchors for pilot design
sources.manual_next_steps: If a selected model is unavailable at execution time, rerun the preregistered nearest-available-model replacement rule and log the deviation.
